items.title: Transformer encoder FFN (BERT, RoBERTa)
items.description: Hidden activations pass through Linear → GELU → Linear in every layer; this is the default MLP pattern in BERT-family encoders and many derivative models.

items.title: Autoregressive language models (GPT-2+)
items.description: GPT-style decoders use GELU (or configured variants) in feed-forward blocks between attention layers, enabling smooth gradients across depth.

items.title: Vision and multimodal Transformers
items.description: ViT, CLIP, and similar architectures often adopt GELU in MLP sublayers for consistency with NLP pretraining recipes and reported quality gains over ReLU.

items.title: Fine-tuning pretrained checkpoints
items.description: When adapting Hugging Face or custom Transformer weights, preserving GELU in the FFN ensures activations and gradients match the pretraining setup.
